    public partial interface IOrderProjectionGrain : global::Edict.Core.Grains.IEdictProjectionBuilder

    }

    [global::Orleans.ImplicitStreamSubscriptionAttribute("Orders")]
    public partial class OrderProjectionGrain : IOrderProjectionGrain
    {
        protected override async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task SubscribeToStreamAsync(
            global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var provider = this.GetStreamProvider("edict");
            var key = this.GetPrimaryKey();
            var stream0 = provider.GetStream<global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent>(
                global::Orleans.Runtime.StreamId.Create("Orders", key));
            await stream0.SubscribeAsync(OnStreamEventAsync, static _ => global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask);
        }

        protected override async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool> DispatchAsync(
            global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent evt)
        {
            switch (evt)
            {
                case global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent typed:
                {
                    var parentContext = global::Edict.Telemetry.ActivityExtensions.RestoreFromStrings(evt.TraceId, evt.SpanId, evt.TraceState);
                    using var span = global::Edict.Telemetry.ActivitySourceExtensions.StartEdictEventHandle(global::Edict.Telemetry.EdictDiagnostics.ActivitySource, "OrderPlacedEvent", parentContext);
                    await DispatchEventAsync(typed, Handle);
                    return true;
                }
                default:
                    return false;
            }
        }
    }
}
